description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on push and pull request events. Set up a matrix job on ubuntu-20.04 to test SQLAlchemy versions 1.4.24 and above with various Python and ClickHouse versions. For each matrix combination, check out the code, set up Python, install test requirements and SQLAlchemy, configure the test environment, start a ClickHouse server container, and run tests with a 2-minute timeout.
